ddls:
CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the game was played */,
  "series_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the series the game belongs to */,
  "series_game" INTEGER /* Game number within the series */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team playing the game */,
  "opp_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the opposing team */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the game (e.g., W (+11), L (-5)) */,
  "mp" INTEGER /* Minutes played in the game */,
  "venue" TEXT /* Location where the game was played */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators */,
  "referee" TEXT /* Name of the referee */,
  "overtime" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the game went into overtime */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_opp_id FOREIGN KEY ("opp_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_series_id FOREIGN KEY ("series_id") REFERENCES series ("series_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "series" (
  "series_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each series */,
  "series_name" TEXT /* Name of the series */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season in which the series took place */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the series */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the series */,
  "series_type" TEXT /* Type of series (e.g., playoffs, regular season) */,
  "home_team" INTEGER /* Reference to the home team for the series */,
  "away_team" INTEGER /* Reference to the away team for the series */,
  "series_notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the series */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("series_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the team is based */,
  "conference" TEXT /* Conference the team belongs to (e.g., Eastern, Western) */,
  "coach" TEXT /* Name of the head coach */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Name of the home stadium */,
  "founded" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "team_notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the player belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player (e.g., PG, SG, SF, PF, C) */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the player */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player */,
  "dob" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Player's jersey number */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "draft_team" INTEGER /* Team that drafted the player */,
  "contract_expiry" INTEGER /* Year the player's current contract expires */,
  "player_notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_performance" (
  "team_performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team performance record */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team */,
  "pts" INTEGER /* Points scored by the team */,
  "fg" INTEGER /* Field goals made by the team */,
  "fga" INTEGER /* Field goals attempted by the team */,
  "fgp" REAL /* Field goal percentage of the team */,
  "three" INTEGER /* Three-pointers made by the team */,
  "threeatt" INTEGER /* Three-pointers attempted by the team */,
  "threep" REAL /* Three-point percentage of the team */,
  "ft" INTEGER /* Free throws made by the team */,
  "fta" INTEGER /* Free throws attempted by the team */,
  "ftp" REAL /* Free throw percentage of the team */,
  "orb" INTEGER /* Offensive rebounds by the team */,
  "drb" INTEGER /* Defensive rebounds by the team */,
  "trb" INTEGER /* Total rebounds by the team */,
  "ast" INTEGER /* Assists by the team */,
  "stl" INTEGER /* Steals by the team */,
  "blk" INTEGER /* Blocks by the team */,
  "tov" INTEGER /* Turnovers by the team */,
  "team_fouls" INTEGER /* Total fouls committed by the team */,
  "largest_lead" INTEGER /* Largest lead achieved by the team during the game */,
  "turnover_ratio" REAL /* Turnover ratio of the team */,
  "pace" REAL /* Pace of the game (possessions per 48 minutes) */,
  "performance_notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the team's performance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_performance_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_performance_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "series_outcomes" (
  "series_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the series */,
  "winner_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the winning team */,
  "loser_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the losing team */,
  "series_score" TEXT /* Score of the series (e.g., 4-2) */,
  "series_type" TEXT /* Type of series (e.g., playoffs, regular season) */,
  "series_notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the series outcome */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("series_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_series_outcomes_loser_id FOREIGN KEY ("loser_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_series_outcomes_winner_id FOREIGN KEY ("winner_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., coach, analyst, admin) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions assigned to the role (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user's role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
